products.name: NW-44 UAV HF Engine
products.descriptor: Single-cylinder 3.5 hp heavy-fuel UAV engine for 18–34 kg aircraft

evidence.snippet: The NW-44 is built for endurance and reliability. Depending on configuration and options, this engine runs at 3.5 horsepower with an 43.6 cc displacement, weighing 3402 grams ± 100 grams. Approved for EAR99.

products.name: NW-88 UAV HF Engine
products.descriptor: Twin-cylinder 7.3 hp heavy-fuel UAV engine for 34–68 kg aircraft

evidence.snippet: The NW-88 is built for endurance and reliability. Depending on configuration and options, this engine runs at 7.3 horsepower with an 88 cc displacement, weighing 7800 grams ± 200 grams. Approved for EAR99.

products.name: NW-230 UAV HF Engine
products.descriptor: Twin-cylinder 15–18 hp multi-fuel UAV engine for 90–160 kg aircraft

evidence.snippet: The NW-230 is built for reliability. Depending on configuration and options, the horsepower range is 15-18 with a 230 cc displacement, weighing 10 kg ± 200 grams. Based on the combat-proven NW-88 and NW-44.

products.name: NWFC-1500 Fuel Cell
products.descriptor: Proton Exchange Membrane hydrogen fuel cell for UAV propulsion

evidence.snippet:
#### NWFC-1500 Fuel Cell
Hydrogen for clean reliable energy. NWUAV's Proton Exchange Membrane (PEM) fuel cell for unmanned propulsion systems.

products.name: Engine Control Unit SW1.0 (ECU)
products.descriptor: Purpose-built ruggedized ECU with CAN bus and adaptive ignition for UAV engines

evidence.snippet:
#### Engine Control Unit SW1.0 (ECU) Features
![Northwest UAV | NW-230 HF UAV Engine](images/products/uav-component-engine-control-unit_200px.png)Purpose-built ECU for unmanned systems and ruggedized to operate in extreme environments. Fully programmable ignition curve/Alpha-N, adaptable to most UAV engine systems.

products.name: Fuel Delivery System (FDS)
products.descriptor: Self-priming EFI fuel delivery system compatible with gasoline or heavy fuel

evidence.snippet:
#### Fuel Delivery System (FDS) Features
![Northwest UAV | NW-230 HF UAV Engine](images/products/uav-component-fuel-delivery-system_200px.png)The NWUAV EFI Fuel System reliably delivers clean, high-pressure fuel for UAV electronic fuel injection solutions. Its components are compatible with gasoline or heavy-fuels. A complete EFI solution can be obtained when combined with the NWUAV SW1.0 ECU.

products.name: Generator (frameless/brushless)
products.descriptor: Compact frameless brushless UAV generator with high-grade permanent magnets

evidence.snippet:
#### Generator (frameless/brushless) Features
![Northwest UAV | NW-230 HF UAV Engine](images/products/uav-component-generator_200px.png)NWUAV’s frameless brushless generator is designed to fit directly into your application, using the system mechanics to hold it. The generator is designed to be highly efficient, with high-grade magnets and materials in a compact design.
*   Highly efficient
*   High-grade permanent magnets
*   150V @ 3000 RPM

products.name: 280-Watt Generator Control Unit (GCU)
products.descriptor: 280 W DC power regulator converting variable alternator output for small UAVs

evidence.snippet:
#### 280-Watt Generator Control Unit (GCU) Features
![Northwest UAV | NW-230 HF UAV Engine](images/products/uav-component-280-watt-generator-control-unit_200px.png)Mix and match your system's voltage and power requirements with the NWUAV GCU. The GCU manages the variable voltage and frequency inputs and outputs stable DC power. Designed to fit the needs of most Small Unmanned Aerial Vehicles.

products.name: RFQ UAV Muffler
products.descriptor: Patented lightweight conformal acoustic muffler for single and multi-cylinder UAV engines

evidence.snippet:
#### RFQ UAV Muffler Features
![Northwest UAV | NW-230 HF UAV Engine](images/products/uav-component-rfq-muffler_200px.png)A NWUAV muffler could solve your noisy problem. Its efficiency is due to the unique, patented internal design. Each muffler is optimized to keep your single or multiple-cylinder engine quiet without reducing engine performance.

products.name: Veronte Autopilot 4x
products.descriptor: Redundant high-reliability autopilot for autonomous UAV/USV/UGV operations

products.name: Veronte Autopilot 1x
products.descriptor: High-reliability autopilot control system for autonomous unmanned vehicles

products.name: Pegasus Industrial & Redundant Servo Actuators
products.descriptor: German-made industrial and redundant UAV servo actuator line, 30–2000 Ncm

evidence.snippet:
#### Pegasus Industrial & Redundant Servo Actuators
###### Northwest UAV is an exclusive authorized United States distributor for Pegasus UAV Servo Actuators

*   **Industrial Servo Actuators** | ranging from 30 to 2000 Ncm, 65 to 1500 grams
*   **Industrial Redundant Actuators** | ranging from 300 to 2000 Ncm, 480 to 2300 grams

products.name: Silvus StreamCaster 4400 Enhanced (SC4400E)
products.descriptor: 4x4 MIMO ruggedized software-defined MANET radio for maximum performance

evidence.snippet: *   **StreamCaster 4400 Enhanced (SC4400E)** | 4x4 MIMO radio in a ruggedized software-defined MANET radio, purpose-built for maximum performance.

products.name: Silvus StreamCaster 4200 Enhanced Plus (SC4200EP)
products.descriptor: 2x2 MIMO MANET radio delivering best-in-class tactical edge connectivity

evidence.snippet: *   **StreamCaster 4200 Enhanced Plus (SC4200EP)** | 2x2 MIMO radio, delivering best-in-class MANET radio performance & connectivity at the tactical edge.

products.name: Silvus StreamCaster Lite 5200 (SL5200)
products.descriptor: Ultra-low SWaP MANET radio with Group 2 performance for Group 1 UAV platforms

evidence.snippet: *   **StreamCaster Lite 5200 (SL5200)** | Group 2 UAV-level performance radio in an ultra-low SWaP form factor designed for Group 1 platforms.

unresolved_questions: NWFC-1500 Fuel Cell detail page (propulsion-pem-fuel-cell.html) was skipped (class budget exhausted); specs such as power output and weight are not confirmed from corpus. Product was classified from the products overview page only.

No product-specific NDAA compliance claims found for any product; NWUAV's own products carry 'AMERICAN-MADE' and AS9100 markings (ndaa=not_disclosed), while distributed products (Pegasus, Silvus, Veronte) have no compliance signal (ndaa=unknown).
Silvus StreamCaster PRISM and StreamCaster Lite 4200 (SL4200) appear on the distributed page but were not in the prioritized list and were not added.

fetch_requests.reason: NWFC-1500 Fuel Cell dedicated product page was skipped; needed for power/weight specs, readiness signals, and any NDAA/compliance claims for this SKU.
